threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Zinx. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Serath. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
ourKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
ourKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
ourKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

ourKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
ourKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
ourKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

ourKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
ourKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
ourKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
ourKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Wild Rush charge → Ruthless Assault → Highland Hurl slow → Unstoppable Force cleanse ult
enemyKits.winCondition: engage Unstoppable and grind with Hersir-empowered swings
enemyKits.passive: Hersir stacks empower the next basic
enemyKits.playAgainst: save CC for after Unstoppable Force; kite her charge

enemyKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
enemyKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing
